allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object {$_.Name -like '*postgre*' -or $_.DisplayName -like '*postgre*'} | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -like '*postgre*' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status | Format-Table" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD ''postgres'';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="postgres" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -d servicetickets -c "SELECT * FROM maschinentyp ORDER BY name;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="postgres" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS servicetickets;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="postgres" psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -c "CREATE DATABASE servicetickets ENCODING ''UTF8'' LC_COLLATE ''German_Germany.1252'' LC_CTYPE ''German_Germany.1252'' TEMPLATE template0;")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''ok, erstellt_von:'''', d.get\(''''erstellt_von''''\)\)")
